text:
On Wed, 26 Dec 2007 16:47:20 -0200
Renato Botelho <garga@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Any news about this?

It is very incomplete.

Mine was better. This one does not start qmail at all. It only starts
tcpserver. And unless something has changed since I last really
messed with qmail and tcpserver, this one also does not have logging.
